name: codebase-cartographer
description: Local codebase intelligence for Codex using static analysis and graph algorithms.

interface.shortDescription: Map, trace, and review a local codebase.
interface.longDescription: Analyze a local repository with Tree-sitter, Git history, and graph algorithms. CodebaseCartographer runs locally and makes no application-level API calls.
defaultPrompt: Before changing this unfamiliar repository, build an evidence-backed change-impact plan.
Trace what could break if I change this function, separating facts, inferences, and unknowns.
Analyze this repository's architecture and identify the most important dependencies with their evidence.
